swipe_percentage.description: Percentage of swipe/chip transactions (must total 100% with ecomm_percentage and keyed_percentage)

ecomm_percentage.description: Percentage of e-commerce transactions (must total 100% with swipe_percentage and keyed_percentage)

keyed_percentage.description: Percentage of manually keyed transactions (must total 100% with swipe_percentage and ecomm_percentage)

card_entry_other.description: Card information entered via other method

card_entry_other_description.description: Description of other card entry method (max 500 characters)

card_entry_ssl_encrypted.description: Internet entry uses SSL encryption or better
